completedorder.description: This table records financial transactions, detailing the order ID, account ID, destination bank, destination account number, transaction amount, and the purpose of each payment (e.g., Household Payment, Loan Payment).

CRM Events.description: This table records consumer complaints related to financial products and services, detailing the date received, product and sub-product categories, specific issues and sub-issues, consumer narratives (if any), submission and company response details, including whether the response was timely and if the consumer disputed it, along with unique complaint and client IDs.

completeddisposition.description: This table lists device assignments, linking device IDs (disp_id) with client IDs and account IDs, and specifies the role (Owner or User) associated with each device within an account.

completedcard.description: This table records the issuance of VISA Signature cards, detailing card IDs, associated display (disp) IDs, the card type, and the issuance date broken down by year, month, day, and in a full date format.

LuxuryLoanPortfolio.description: This table provides detailed information on loan records, including loan ID, funded amount, funding date, loan duration, interest rates, payment details, borrower's personal information (name, social security number, phone number, employment), and property details (value, purpose, address, city, state, building class, tax class). Each row represents a unique loan, primarily for boats, with data on the property's classification and the borrower's employment history.

CRM Call Center Logs.description: This table records customer service calls, including details such as the date received, complaint ID, client information, phone number, call handling details (like call ID, priority, and type), the outcome, the server (agent) who handled the call, and the service start and exit times along with the total service duration.

completedloan.description: This table lists car loans, including details such as loan ID, account ID, loan amount, duration in months, monthly payments, loan status, date of loan issuance (year, month, day, and full date), location code, and the purpose of the loan.

completeddistrict.description: This table lists districts, including their IDs, city names, state names, state abbreviations, regions, and divisions within the United States.

completedtrans.description: This table records credit transactions made in cash, detailing transaction IDs, account IDs, amounts, balances, and the exact date and time of each transaction in 2013.

CRM Reviews.description: This table contains customer reviews for Eagle National Mortgage, including the date of the review, the star rating given (out of 5), the content of the review, the product or service reviewed, and the district ID associated with the review.

completedacct.description: This table records monthly account issuances, detailing the account ID, district ID, issuance frequency, and the exact date of issuance broken down by year, month, and day, starting from January 1, 2013.

completedclient.description: This table contains detailed personal information for clients, including their ID, sex, full date of birth (with separate columns for day, month, and year), age, social security number, full name (first, middle, last), phone number, email address, physical address (with address line 1 and 2, city, state, and zipcode), and district ID.
